creator: karabojkov@kit.bg
text: I found a solution - compiling emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod with VIMAGE support on solved the problem. The rebuild of all ports inherited the old value - VIMAGE off. I see it was turned on by default on 24 Oct 2017. I guess if this option is mandatory (at least for the bridged networking) there should be some scary warning during ports build
